case_title: BETHANY ELLENBOGEN VS. MYND MANAGEMENT, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $180) SERVED APR-05-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MYND MANAGEMENT, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-11-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BETHANY ELLENBOGEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MYND MANAGEMENT, INC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-17-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BETHANY ELLENBOGEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MYND MANAGEMENT INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ZO HAMID, PROPERTY MANAGER. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $4394.98 (COSTS INCLUDED) TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JUNE 17TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLENBOGEN, BETHANY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,175.00 FILED BY ELLENBOGEN, BETHANY AS TO DEFENDANT MYND MANAGEMENT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
